listing.name: User Psychology Skill
listing.tagline: Auto-apply conversion psychology to every UI you build
listing.description: Stop building UI that looks good but does not convert. This skill teaches Claude 10 proven user psychology principles so every interface it builds is automatically optimized for conversion. Works across ecommerce, SaaS, fintech, healthcare, and edtech. Claude detects your industry, applies the right psychology combination, and explains every design decision it makes.

features.title: Auto Industry Detection
features.description: Claude automatically detects whether you are building for ecommerce, SaaS, fintech, healthcare, or edtech and applies the correct psychology combination.

features.title: 10 Core Psychology Principles
features.description: CTA psychology, color theory, social proof, FOMO, eye patterns, above-fold hooks, pricing psychology, form optimization, trust signals, and dark pattern avoidance.

features.title: Real World Analysis
features.description: Learn from how Amazon, Netflix, Spotify, Razorpay, and Swiggy apply psychology at scale. These examples are baked into Claude's responses.

features.title: Psychology Decisions Table
features.description: Every UI Claude generates includes a Psychology Decisions table explaining which principles were applied, why, and what conversion impact to expect.

features.title: A/B Test Recommendations
features.description: Claude automatically suggests the top 3 elements to A/B test first based on the industry and principles applied.

features.title: Multi-Platform Support
features.description: Works on Claude Desktop, Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, GitHub Copilot, Gemini CLI, Continue, and Roo Code.

useCases.title: Landing Page Optimization
useCases.prompt: Build a landing page for my fintech startup
useCases.result: Claude applies trust signals, blue color psychology, minimal FOMO, and above-fold hooks specific to fintech

useCases.title: Pricing Page Design
useCases.prompt: Create a pricing page for my SaaS product
useCases.result: Claude applies decoy pricing, anchoring, middle plan highlight, annual toggle psychology, and risk reversal

useCases.title: Checkout Optimization
useCases.prompt: Design a checkout flow for my ecommerce store
useCases.result: Claude reduces form fields, adds progress bars, applies trust badges, and includes FOMO signals near CTA

useCases.title: Healthcare Portal
useCases.prompt: Build a homepage for my telemedicine platform
useCases.result: Claude applies maximum trust signals, zero FOMO, doctor credentials psychology, and calm color palette

useCases.title: Edtech Course Page
useCases.prompt: Create a course enrollment page for my bootcamp
useCases.result: Claude applies cohort FOMO, placement statistics social proof, EMI pricing psychology, and outcome-focused headlines

installation.manual: Copy CLAUDE.md and .claude/ folder to your project root

screenshots.title: Psychology Decisions Table
screenshots.description: Claude explains every design decision with expected conversion impact

screenshots.title: Industry Auto-Detection
screenshots.description: Claude detects fintech and applies trust-heavy psychology automatically

screenshots.title: CLI Installer
screenshots.description: One command installs the skill for any AI platform
